title: ENABLE and DISABLE instruction in USER-1 Mode

content.text: As per the Tricore architecture we can call ENABLE and DISABLE instruction in USER-1 Mode

content.local_path: _images/ENABLE and DISABLE instruction in USER-1 Mode/image-2023-7-15_12-11-31.png

content.text: But we see Trap is called if we execute these instructions in User mode with Vector OS
we can explicitly disable the access of these instructions in User-1 mode by enabling U1_IED bit in SYSCON register

items: Start OS is enabling this bit and hence if we call ENABLE or DISABLE instruction in USER mode ends in trap (Protection Hook)

content.local_path: _images/ENABLE and DISABLE instruction in USER-1 Mode/image-2023-7-15_12-13-9.png
